Headline: #119 Michigan/119th Temporary Reroute at 119th/Normal
ShortDescription: #119 Michigan/119th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 119th, Halsted, 115th, Wentworth and 119th due to construction near 119th/Normal.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#119 Michigan/119th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 119th, Halsted, 115th, Wentworth and 119th, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near 119th/Normal.
